name: First Cash Pawn
description_short: First Cash Pawn Duncanville, Texas — FirstCash is the leading international operator of pawn stores with 3,300+ locations across 29 U.S. states, the UK,...
description_long:
FirstCash, Inc. is headquartered in Fort Worth, Texas and operates as the leading international pawn shop operator with over 3,300 retail locations. The company was founded to serve cash and credit-constrained consumers through a network spanning 29 U.S. states, the District of Columbia, the United Kingdom, and Latin America (Mexico, Guatemala, Colombia, and El Salvador). FirstCash is publicly traded and included in both the S&P MidCap 400 Index and Russell 2000 Index, employing approximately 22,000 people globally.

FirstCash's core business involves buying and selling merchandise (jewelry, electronics, tools, appliances, sporting goods, and musical instruments) and offering pawn loans secured by pledged personal property. These are non-recourse loans, meaning borrowers cannot be pursued for additional payment if the item is insufficient collateral. The company also operates layaway services with 10% down payments and buys gold, silver, and platinum for immediate cash. Additionally, through its wholly owned subsidiary AFF, FirstCash provides lease-to-own and retail finance payment solutions through over 15,000 active retail merchant partner locations nationwide.

FirstCash distinguishes itself through its massive scale—3,300+ locations make it the dominant player in the pawn industry. The company maintains a significant international presence unusual for pawn operators, with established operations across Latin America and the United Kingdom. Their integrated business model combining retail pawn with technology-driven point-of-sale payment solutions (AFF subsidiary) and gold buying services creates multiple revenue streams and customer touchpoints.

For consumers, FirstCash provides fast access to cash without credit checks or income verification, which is valuable for credit-constrained individuals. However, pawn loans carry inherent risks: if you cannot repay, you lose your collateral permanently. Interest rates and fees on pawn loans, while typically lower than payday loans, can still be substantial depending on local regulations. The service is best suited for temporary cash needs when you have valuable items to pledge and understand the risk of losing them.
address: 130 W Camp Wisdom Rd A, Duncanville, TX 75116

company_info.headquarters: 130 W Camp Wisdom Rd A, Duncanville, TX 75116

pros: Massive network of 3,300+ locations across 29 U.S. states, DC, UK, Mexico, Guatemala, Colombia, and El Salvador for convenience
Non-recourse pawn loans—no debt collection or credit reporting if you forfeit collateral
Fast cash access without credit checks, income verification, or lengthy approval processes
Buys and accepts wide variety of items: jewelry, electronics, tools, appliances, sporting goods, musical instruments
Layaway service available with just 10% down payment for budgeting-conscious shoppers
Gold and precious metal buying program offering immediate cash for items most people own
Publicly traded company (S&P MidCap 400, Russell 2000) providing transparency and operational stability
cons: Pawn loans result in permanent loss of collateral if you cannot repay—no opportunity to recover the item after default
Interest rates and fees on pawn loans can be high depending on state regulations, making them expensive compared to traditional loans
Limited to consumers who own valuable items to pledge; not accessible for those without collateral
Pawn loan terms are typically short (30-90 days), requiring quick repayment which may be unaffordable for those with ongoing financial constraints
No credit-building benefit—pawn loans do not report to credit bureaus, so they cannot help improve credit scores
best_for: Cash-constrained consumers who need immediate funds and own valuable items (jewelry, electronics, tools) to pledge as collateral
People with poor or no credit history who cannot qualify for traditional personal loans or credit products
Those seeking temporary short-term loans without formal debt obligations or credit reporting
Individuals looking to buy merchandise at discount from pawn shop inventory or sell gold and precious metals for quick cash
diagnosis: FirstCash is best for cash-constrained consumers who own valuable items and need immediate funds without credit checks or formal lending relationships. The main caveat is that pawn loans are high-risk for borrowers: failure to repay means permanent loss of collateral, and the short repayment terms (30-90 days) may be unaffordable for those with ongoing financial instability. This is a temporary solution, not a long-term credit-building strategy.
services: Pawn loans secured by pledged personal property
Retail sales of jewelry, electronics, tools, appliances, sporting goods, and musical instruments
Gold, silver, and platinum buying and cash payouts
Layaway service with 10% down payment option
Store locator to find nearest FirstCash location
Lease-to-own and retail finance solutions through AFF subsidiary (15,000+ merchant partners)
Online inventory browsing and merchandise search
Point-of-sale payment solutions through AFF subsidiary
Pawn FAQs and educational resources about pawn loans
Consumer privacy and data protection compliance
Cash payment on the spot for items purchased
